title: Poppyseed Cake
ingredients: 1 ½ tsp. butter flavoring or emulsion
1/3 c. orange juice concentrate (from the can)
½ tsp butter flavoring or emulsion
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, mix together sugar, milk, oil, eggs, poppyseeds, vanilla, butter flavoring, and almond flavoring until well combined.
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix until fully combined.
Pour batter into 2 greased and floured loaf pans or 1 greased and floured tube pan.
Remove from oven and let cool for 20-30 minutes.
While cake is still very warm, poke holes on top with a fork.
In a small saucepan, add sugar, butter, orange juice concentrate, vanilla, butter flavoring, and almond flavoring.
Heat glaze ingredients until sugar melts thoroughly.
Mix glaze until smooth and well combined.
Pour or spoon glaze over cake.
Let cake cool completely while glaze soaks in.
notes: Recipe was given by a nurse preceptor during senior year of nursing school at University of Arizona.
Omit almond flavoring if making for Grant.
Orange juice concentrate should be used directly from the can.
